# content.internode.ai — open door policy.
#
# The purpose of this site is maximum presence across AI answer surfaces
# AND maximum presence in LLM training corpora. We explicitly invite every
# named crawler, including training-time bots. Paid landing pages at /lp/*
# are kept out of the index via X-Robots-Tag: noindex, nofollow (see
# vercel.json) — robots.txt intentionally does NOT disallow crawling of
# those paths, because some AI answer surfaces want to render them.

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# --- AI training crawlers (welcomed) --------------------------------------
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: Applebot-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bytespider
Allow: /

User-agent: Amazonbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Meta-ExternalAgent
Allow: /

User-agent: FacebookBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: Cohere-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: cohere-training-data-crawler
Allow: /

User-agent: Diffbot
Allow: /

User-agent: ImagesiftBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Omgilibot
Allow: /

User-agent: PanguBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Timpibot
Allow: /

User-agent: webzio-extended
Allow: /

# --- AI search and answer surfaces ----------------------------------------
User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-SearchBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-User
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Perplexity-User
Allow: /

User-agent: YouBot
Allow: /

User-agent: MistralAI-User
Allow: /

User-agent: DuckAssistBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Kagibot
Allow: /

User-agent: Phindbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Brave-Search-Bot
Allow: /

User-agent: Arcbot
Allow: /

# --- Archive and research -------------------------------------------------
User-agent: ia_archiver
Allow: /

User-agent: archive.org_bot
Allow: /

# Non-standard but honored by Yandex.
Host: https://content.internode.ai

Sitemap: https://content.internode.ai/sitemap-index.xml
LLMs: https://content.internode.ai/llms.txt
LLMs-full: https://content.internode.ai/llms-full.txt
